violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Hand sink counter/cabinet showing wear/damage and is in need of repair.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Wire rack shelving in walk in cooler needs detail cleaning. Counter under flat grill on cook line has build up of debris and needs cleaning.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings (e.g. light fixtures, vent covers, decorations etc..) were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. Current HVAC repairs remain unfinished. Exposed spray foam insulation not yet covered.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor needs cleaning under shelving units in walk in cooler.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floor tiles broken/missing near service alley. Hole in wall near prep sink needs repair.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
